commands.review_summary:
The PR updates Telegram and Feishu reasoning-preview resolution to use per-agent/global `reasoningDefault`, adds a plugin SDK helper with tests/docs/changelog, and introduces a `verbose` reasoning mode across config, command, and TUI surfaces.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows Telegram and Feishu ignore configured reasoning defaults in their preview-resolution paths, while docs and core reply resolution already define per-agent/global `reasoningDefault` precedence.
commands.review_followup: The branch fixes a real current-main gap, but it is dirty against main and includes a broader public `verbose` mode, so the next action is maintainer review and rebase/split judgment rather than an autonomous replacement fix.

target.title: fix(telegram,feishu): enable Claude CLI reasoning via reasoningDefault config
target.author: anagnorisis2peripeteia
